'''Thar Lasan''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Loan shark]] working in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. The criminal organization led by Lasan included [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] mercenary [[Beatas]]. Around [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], Lasan died unexpectedly, probably due to some intervention by rival crimelord [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]]. Lasan's organization was merged with Ploovo's.<ref name="AIR" />
